excluded_power_reason: Quick preflight sustained approximately 925 mA, too close to the PPK2 1 A measurement ceiling.

continuous_rx_recovery.root_cause: A quiet-period UART drain could extend indefinitely under sustained receive traffic and overrun the PPK2 trigger deadline.
continuous_rx_recovery.fix: Use an absolute drain deadline and retain partial UART lines across bounded read windows.

notes: All requested radio-axis values were applied and verified through physical AT+CFG? readback.
The 4.8 kbps recovery is the only accepted replacement; original failed attempts remain archived for provenance.
High-rate large-payload packet loss was confirmed from preserved receiver responses and by the independent continuous-RX sweep.
Requested TX power is a modem configuration value and is not a calibrated radiated-power measurement.
